walkthrough.title: See FrogsWork in under 3 minutes
summary: Home dashboard with sales this month, outstanding, and paid totals
Create an invoice: customer, line items, and payment due
Save and see the tax invoice PDF on the success screen
Send the invoice to the customer by email
Browse past invoices: search, filter, View PDF
Mark an invoice paid and return to Home to see totals update

tutorials.title: Install on Windows
steps: Open frogswork.com and go to Download
Download and run the Windows setup file
Open FrogsWork from the Start menu
Sign in with your FrogsWork Cloud account
Confirm the app shows Home with the left navigation

tutorials.title: Install on iPhone
steps: Open Safari and go to app.frogswork.com
Sign in if prompted
Tap Share, then Add to Home Screen
Open FrogsWork from the home screen
Confirm the bottom tabs: Home, Invoices, Customers, Settings

tutorials.title: Install on Android
steps: Open Chrome and go to app.frogswork.com
Sign in if prompted
Tap the browser menu, then Install app or Add to Home screen
Open FrogsWork from the home screen
Confirm the bottom tabs: Home, Invoices, Customers, Settings

tutorials.title: Set up business details
steps: Open Settings → Business details
Enter business name, email, phone, and address
Add ABN and set Registered for GST if needed
Upload a logo and place it in the invoice header preview
Tap Save

tutorials.title: Add a customer
steps: Open Customers
Tap + to add a customer
Enter name, email, and address
Tap Save and confirm they appear in the list

tutorials.title: Add a customer while invoicing
steps: Open Invoices and start a new invoice
Tap + Add beside the customer field
Fill in the customer sheet and save
Confirm the new customer is selected on the invoice

tutorials.title: Create an invoice
steps: Open Invoices and tap + (or Create sales invoice on Home)
Select a customer and add line items
Adjust payment due if needed
Tap Save invoice
On the success screen, review the PDF, then Download, Send, or Done

tutorials.title: Manage GST
steps: In Business details, set Registered for GST to Yes
Create an invoice and open a line item
Toggle GST applicable or GST-free on the line
Check the invoice totals update on screen
Save and confirm GST on the tax invoice PDF

tutorials.title: Manage past invoices
steps: Open Invoices
Search or filter by Not sent, Sent, or Paid
Open View PDF on an invoice
Use Send, Mark paid, or move the status as needed

tutorials.title: Email an invoice
steps: Open an invoice that is Not sent (or use Send on the success screen)
Tap Send / Send to customer
Wait for the status to become Sent
Optional: check Settings → General → Email sending for CC or BCC to yourself

tutorials.title: Send a quote or price estimate
steps: Open Settings → General and turn on Enable quotes
Open the Quotes tab between Home and Invoices
Create a quote or price estimate with customer and line items
Send it by email (the PDF has no How to pay block)
When they accept, open the sent quote and choose Create invoice
Optional: use the From quote / Converted to invoice links to jump between the two

tutorials.title: Use the dashboard
steps: Open Home
Review Sales this month, Outstanding, and Paid all time
Tap Create sales invoice or Past invoices

tutorials.title: Subscribe and manage billing
steps: Open frogswork.com and create an account (or open Subscribe from the app gate)
Choose Cloud monthly or annual and complete Stripe checkout
Return to the app and sign in
Open Settings → Account → Manage subscription to review or cancel

tutorials.title: Uninstall the Windows app
steps: Open the Windows Start menu
Right-click FrogsWork and choose Uninstall
Follow the uninstaller
Confirm you can still use app.frogswork.com in a browser after uninstall
